description: Full-stack developer responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining complex business solutions across multiple platforms. The flagship project is the global e-commerce platform at abrites.com — serving 4 independent legal entities across different jurisdictions worldwide, supporting international trade with a highly customized product catalog, order pipeline, and per-client dynamic pricing engine that allows individual customers to hold multiple price lists for the same item, updated in near-real-time to reflect market and business conditions.

The platform integrates 15 payment providers, 8 of which I designed and implemented from scratch to meet specific regional and business requirements. It operates across 3 different ERP systems simultaneously and supports 4 legal departments with distinct compliance, invoicing, and reporting needs. The sales model is fully custom — built around the unique pricing and business logic of the global automotive diagnostics industry.

Data integrity is a core responsibility: I design and execute ETL pipelines to migrate, validate, normalize, and consolidate data arriving from multiple external sources, ensuring consistency across all connected systems. This includes large-scale legacy data migrations and ongoing synchronization between heterogeneous platforms.

Beyond e-commerce, I maintain and extend: an internal ERP/CRM (Python / Django + PostgreSQL), a custom CMS, an event management system (Django + SQLite), and 4 OpenCart 1.4 storefronts. I also lead CI/CD pipeline design (GitLab CI, bash scripting), REST API development (Django REST Framework + Swagger), and integration with the Dolibarr ERP system.

Worked on large and complex e-commerce projects using Magento (Adobe Commerce). Delivered customizations on core functionality, developed custom B2B modules and processes, and redesigned the checkout and invoicing pipeline.

Developed and maintained a wide range of projects varying in scale and complexity — from small landing pages for local businesses to complex systems for banks and insurance companies. Built custom e-commerce solutions from scratch.
Worked on a variety of small to mid-scale websites and APIs.

groups.label: Approach
items: Strong focus on problem analysis and solution design; experienced in breaking down complex business requirements into precise technical solutions, and in leveraging AI tooling to architect and implement features independently and efficiently.

projects.name: breezy-bg.com
projects.description: Shopware 6.5 e-commerce platform. Developed custom modules to replace and extend the core cart and checkout concept. Implemented independently using AI-assisted development (Codex / Claude). Optimized for Bulgarian e-commerce law compliance.

projects.name: abrites.com
projects.description: Global automotive diagnostics e-commerce platform. See Abrites LTD in Work Experience for full detail.
